question.text:
Dear @Joanne Ding/CUL-CN/IT <mail

 

Cc : CUL Support teams

 

Good morning

 

Noted below. Please note the 2 containers corresponding to bill CULVJI2600085 are as follows:

 

TLLU2647477 

DFSU2297843

 

Same have been updated but unable to revised the quantity of the booking to ‘’2’’ instead of ‘’3’’.

 

Thank you.

 

 

Best Regards

Madina Mohamed
Assit.Manager -Sales & Export

Djibouti Shipping Services SARL
(as Agents only)
Republic of Djibouti   
4th. Floor, Salaam Tower, Opposite of Nougaprix Hypermarket 
Tel : +253 21 35 46 40 / Mobile No: +253 77 28 39 87
Email: madina@dssdjibouti.com <mail

website: www.sharafshipping.com <http://www.sharafshipping.com/>  

Middle East   Af

answer.text:
Dear Madina,

Please try to change Occupy to 1 so that the container quantity will be correctly shown as 2.



Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


Date: Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 14:30

Subject: RE: SPLIT BOOKING ISSUE--CULVJIB2600032 (MASTER BILL)
